Description: Components re-rendering when props haven't changed"
Do: Use React.memo() for pure components, useMemo for expensive calculations
Don't: Don't recreate objects/functions in render

Description: Using index as key or missing key for list items"
Do: Use stable, unique IDs as keys (UUID, database ID)
Don't: Don't use array index as key for dynamic lists"

Description: Creating new function references on every render"
Do: Define callbacks with useCallback, pass as props
Don't: Don't create inline arrow functions in JSX

Description: Expensive calculations running on every render"
Do: Use useMemo for expensive computations
Don't: Don't compute heavy values in render body"

Description: Using Context for frequently changing values causing mass re-renders"
Do: Split context by update frequency, use local state when possible
Don't: Don't put everything in one global context
Code Example Good: const UserContext = createContext(); const ThemeContext = createContext();'

Keywords: stale, closure, variable, outdated, old value
Description: Hooks capturing stale values from previous renders"
Do: Use functional state updates, include dependencies in useEffect
Don't: Don't rely on closure variables for current state

Keywords: bundle, split, chunk, lazy, dynamic import
Description: Loading entire app bundle instead of route-based splitting"
Do: Use React.lazy() + Suspense for route-level code splitting
Don't: Don't import everything statically

Description: Importing entire libraries when only specific functions are needed"
Do: Import specific functions: import { debounce } from 'lodash'
Don't: Don't import entire libraries"

Description: Using large libraries for simple functionality"
Do: Use lightweight alternatives or native APIs
Don't: Don't add heavy deps for simple tasks"

Description: Making sequential API calls that could be parallel"
Do: Use Promise.all() for independent requests
Don't: Don't await each fetch sequentially"
column12: 'const user = await fetchUser(); const posts = await fetchPosts();'

Description: Making duplicate API calls for same data"
Do: Implement caching with React Query, SWR, or custom cache
Don't: Don't refetch data that hasn't changed

Description: No visual feedback during data fetching"
Do: Show loading skeletons, error boundaries, retry buttons
Don't: Don't leave blank space during loading

Description: Using large
Do: React
Don't: Use next/image, lazy loading, WebP format, srcset
Code Example Good: Don't use raw PNG/JPEG without optimization

Description: Not memoizing expensive computations or callbacks"
Do: Memoize expensive values with useMemo, callbacks with useCallback
Don't: Don't recompute or recreate on every render

Description: Lifting state too high causing unnecessary re-renders"
Do: Colocate state with components that use it
Don't: Don't lift state to parent when only child needs it"

Description: Not using dynamic imports for route components"
Do: Use React.lazy for route-based code splitting
Don't: Don't statically import all route components"

Description: Components re-rendering too frequently"
Do: Use React DevTools Profiler, useMemo, React.memo
Don't: Don't ignore re-render warnings in devtools

Description: Too many context providers causing re-render cascades"
Do: Split contexts by update frequency, use selectors
Don't: Don't put all state in single context

Keywords: abort, cancel, cleanup, unmount, memory leak
Description: Not cancelling fetch requests on component unmount"
Do: Use AbortController to cancel pending requests
Don't: Don't let stale requests update unmounted components
Code Example Good: useEffect(() => { const controller = new AbortController(); fetch(url

Description: Reading layout properties after style mutations"
Do: Batch DOM reads before writes, use requestAnimationFrame
Don't: Don't interleave reads and writes
Code Example Good: const h = el.offsetHeight; rAF(() => { el.style.height = h + 10 + 'px'; });'
